news.title: Call for Papers Now Open
news.content: We invite researchers and practitioners to submit extended abstracts (2–4 pages) on AI/ML for bank supervision, NLP for regulatory reporting, and LLMs in supervisory processes. Submission deadline: October 1, 2026. Notification of acceptance: October 15, 2026.

news.title: Workshop Website Launched
news.content: The official workshop website is now live with full details on the program, call for papers, organizing committee, and venue information. Registration will open in summer 2026.

news.title: Workshop Announced
news.content: We are pleased to announce the Digital Finance for Supervision workshop, jointly organized by the European Central Bank and the MSCA DIGITAL network. The half-day event will take place on December 3, 2026 at the ECB in Frankfurt am Main. Attendance is free of charge.
